basic_details.job_title: HLL Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Staff Nurse, Lab Technician and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Senior Lab Technician, Lab Technician, Junior Lab Technician, Staff Nurse, Medical Transcriptionist, Medical Biochemist
basic_details.short_information: The HLL Lifecare Limited (HLL) has officially announced the Senior Lab Technician, Lab Technician, Junior Lab Technician, Staff Nurse, Medical Transcriptionist, and Medical Biochemist Recruitment 2026. The detailed notification was published on the official HLL website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 37 years and hold qualifications such as DMLT, B.Sc (MLT), M.Sc (MLT), B.Sc Nursing, GNM, Any Graduate Degree, or M.Sc (Medical Biochemistry) can attend the walk-in recruitment process on 17 June 2026. Direct links to download the notification and check the walk-in venue details are

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 37 years. Age relaxation as per Government of India rules for SC/ST/OBC/PwD categories.

qualification.education_qualification: DMLT, BSC(MLT), MSC(MLT), BSC Nursing, GNM, Any Graduate Degree, MSC (Medical Biochemistry)
qualification.details: Senior Lab Technician: DMLT/BSC(MLT)/MSC(MLT) - For DMLT min 8 years, BSC(MLT) 7 years, MSC(MLT) 5 years post-qualification experience in clinical laboratory. Lab Technician: DMLT/BSC(MLT) - For DMLT min 4 years, BSC(MLT) 3 years post-qualification experience in clinical laboratory. Junior Lab Technician: DMLT/BSC(MLT) - For DMLT min 2 years, BSC(MLT) 1 year post-qualification experience in clinical laboratory. Staff Nurse: BSC Nursing / GNM - For BSC Nursing min 1 year, GNM 3 years experience in nursing. Medical Transcriptionist: Any Graduate Degree with minimum 2 years experience in medical diagnostic services as Medical Transcriptionist. Medical Biochemist: MSC (Medical Biochemistry) with minimum 3 years experience in clinical laboratory.

faq.question: Q1. What is the walk-in interview date for HLL Lifecare Limited recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for HLL Lifecare Limited recruitment is scheduled for 17 June 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What is the maximum age limit for the posts announced by HLL?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts announced by HLL Lifecare Limited is 37 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India rules for eligible categories.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the HLL Various Positions?
faq.answer: The required educational qualifications vary by post and include DMLT, BSC(MLT), MSC(MLT), BSC Nursing, GNM, Any Graduate Degree, and MSC (Medical Biochemistry), along with specific years of experience.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can attend the walk-in interview without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the mode of application for HLL Lifecare Limited recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application for this recruitment is Walk-in. Interested and eligible candidates need to attend the walk-in interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for the positions advertised by HLL?
faq.answer: The positions advertised by HLL Lifecare Limited are on a Contractual basis. Candidates will be appointed on a contract for the duration specified by the organization.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary range for the advertised posts?
faq.answer: The salary ranges vary for each post, with the lowest being [9500.00 - 19000.00] and the highest being [14000.00 - 32500.00]. Specific salary details are provided for each position.

faq.question: Q8. What are the selection processes for these HLL jobs?
faq.answer: The selection process for the advertised posts will include a Skill Test and a Written Test. Candidates need to perform well in both stages to be considered for the positions.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted in Kochi, Kerala, at the HLL Lifecare Limited facility. The exact address and venue details will be available in the official notification.
